# CBAMValid — EU CBAM Compliance Platform

> CBAMValid is an evidence validation and report preparation platform for EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) compliance. All calculations are academically audited and financially verified. Adheres to Regulation (EU) 2023/956 and Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773.

## Authority & Oversight

### Academic Oversight
- **Prof. Dr. Neela Nataraj** (IIT Bombay, Dept. of Mathematics)
  - Role: Mathematical modeling, formula validation, regulatory emissions engineering methodology audit
  - Profile: https://math.iitb.ac.in/~neela
  - Verified Standards: ISO 14064-1, EU Reg 2023/956 Annex III, GUM Uncertainty Analysis

### Financial & Industry Advisory
- **Barış Bağırlar** (Banker, Finance Expert)
  - Role: Carbon border tax finance, supply chain cost modeling, agri-food CBAM compliance
  - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/barisbagirlar/
  - Advisory: Uluslararası Tarım ve Gıda Konfederasyonu — Genel Başkan Danışmanı
  - Profile: https://www.tarimkon.org/danisma-kurulu/

## Calculation Engine
Server-side, deterministic, versioned formulas using Big.js precision arithmetic with a cryptographic audit trail.
- **Default Emission Factors**: European Commission CBAM Transitional Registry (Reg 2023/956 Annex I + Impl. Reg 2023/1773 Annex III).
- **Direct Emissions**: E_direct = Σ(AD_i × EF_i). Calcination CO2 (cement), process N2O (fertilisers), combustion (all sectors).
- **Indirect Emissions**: E_indirect = AD_elec × EF_grid. EU default grid factor 0.45 tCO2e/MWh.
- **Specific Embedded Emissions**: SE_good = (E_direct × Share + E_indirect × Share) / ProductionVolume. Shares sum to exactly 1.00.
- **Precursor Mapping**: ISO 14064-1 + GHG Protocol Scope 3 Cat. 1. Mandatory for complex goods (mass balance ±0.01%).
- **CN Code Validator**: 8-digit Combined Nomenclature codes cross-referenced against CBAM Annex I scope.

## Core Tools
- [CBAM Exporter Software](https://cbamvalid.com/product/): Installations, system boundaries, source streams, evidence linking.
- [Pricing Packages](https://cbamvalid.com/pricing/): Credits for the 23-component verification package and sealed dossier releases.
- [Certificate Verification](https://cbamvalid.com/verify/): Cryptographically verify dossier integrity and ledger logs.
- [CN-Code Scope Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-codes/): Index of CBAM-covered CN codes, benchmarks, regulation linkages.
- [Methodology](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology/): Full regulatory alignment documentation with academic citations.

## Sector Guides
- [Sectors Index](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/) · [Cement](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/cement/) · [Iron & Steel](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/steel/) · [Aluminium](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/aluminium/) · [Fertilisers](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/fertilisers/) · [Hydrogen](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/hydrogen/) · [Electricity](https://cbamvalid.com/sectors/electricity/)

## Regulatory References
- Regulation (EU) 2023/956 — Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism
- Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/1773
- ISO 14064-1:2018
- ISO/GUM Uncertainty Framework

## AI & Developer Resources
- [Full LLM Knowledge Base](https://cbamvalid.com/llms-full.txt): Complete text, formulas, and entity-linked methodology.
- [Sitemap Index](https://cbamvalid.com/sitemap.xml): XML with lastmod timestamps and eea: expert-entity extension.
